allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('src/data/products-chanel.json'\)\); print\('Sample product:', json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('src/data/search-index.json'\)\); print\('Total products:', len\(data\)\); print\('Sample with subcategory:'\); sample=[p for p in data if p.get\('brand'\)=='Chanel'][:3]; [print\(f\\"  {p['name']} -> {p.get\('subcategory', 'MISSING'\)}\\"\) for p in sample]")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('src/data/search-index.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Total products:', len\(data\)\); print\('Sample Chanel products:'\); sample=[p for p in data if p.get\('brand'\)=='Chanel'][:3]; [print\(f\\"  {p['name'][:50]}... -> {p.get\('subcategory', 'MISSING'\)}\\"\) for p in sample]")
